tools.name: vendor_search
tools.description:
This tool must be used only for wedding-related searches (e.g., planning a wedding ceremony, reception, rehearsal dinner, or associated wedding events).
Use this tool when a user is looking for wedding or wedding-adjacent vendors and provides (or can be asked to provide): A supported vendor category and a U.S. location (City, State)
If either the category or location is missing, ChatGPT should ask a clarifying question before calling the tool.
The tool supports soft wedding intent; the user does not need to explicitly say "wedding."
Supported Events: Weddings (ceremony & reception), engagement parties, rehearsal dinners, welcome parties.
Supported Vendor Categories: Photographers, Videographers, DJs, Bands, Ensembles & Soloists, Photo Booths, Wedding Planners, Officiants, Florists, Decor, Rentals, Caterers, Bar Services, Cakes, Beauty, Bridal Salons, Jewelers, Invitations & Paper Goods, Favors & Gifts, Dance Lessons, Reception Venues, Rehearsal Dinner Venues, Transportation, Travel Specialists.
The tool does not support vendors who offer cannabis services, including requests involving: marijuana, hemp, cannabis, THC, CBD, or ganja
Location Rules: U.S. locations only
Do NOT Use This Tool For: Hotel blocks or lodging-only services, Non-wedding services or general local business search, Home services or home improvement, Educational, or informational wedding content.
If a request falls outside these constraints, explain that The Knot Marketplace only supports eligible wedding vendors and do not call the tool.
